summary: Comprehensive testing of Review Reward System feature - discount code generation for approved customer reviews. All 9 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/reviews/reward-settings returns default {review_reward_percentage: 5, review_reward_enabled: true} - PASS
PUT /api/reviews/reward-settings allows admin to update percentage and toggle enabled/disabled - PASS
PUT /api/reviews/{id}/status?status=approved generates REVIEW-XXXX promo code for customer reviews - PASS
Generated promo codes have correct properties: percentage discount, max_uses=1, 30-day expiry, source='review_reward' - PASS
No promo code generated when approving admin-created (non-customer) reviews - PASS
No duplicate promo code if review already has reward_promo_code set - PASS
Disabled rewards setting prevents promo code generation - PASS
Admin reviews page shows reward settings card with Gift icon, toggle switch, percentage input, and Save button - PASS
Public /reviews page shows reward incentive banner: 'Leave a review and get a discount code for your next purchase!' - PASS
Order completion email at /api/orders/{id}/complete links to /reviews instead of Trustpilot - PASS (verified in code)
seed_data_creation: Used direct MongoDB insertion for test customer reviews (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review Reward System fully tested. Key features working: (1) Reward settings configurable via admin panel (GET/PUT /api/reviews/reward-settings), (2) Promo codes auto-generated on customer review approval with format REVIEW-{first8chars}, (3) Promo code properties: percentage discount, single-use, 30-day expiry, source=review_reward, (4) Admin reviews page has reward settings card with toggle and percentage input, (5) Public /reviews page has reward incentive banner, (6) No duplicate promos for re-approved reviews, (7) No promos for admin-created reviews. Database: test_database. Note: Currently 0 customer reviews in system - all 33 reviews are admin-created manual reviews.

features_tested.GET /api/reviews/reward-settings: PASS - Returns default or saved settings
features_tested.PUT /api/reviews/reward-settings: PASS - Admin can update percentage (tested 5% -> 10% -> 8%) and enable/disable
features_tested.Duplicate promo prevention: PASS - Re-approving review doesn't create new promo
features_tested.Disabled rewards: PASS - No promo generated when review_reward_enabled=false
features_tested.Admin reward settings card UI: PASS - Gift icon, toggle, percentage input, save button present
features_tested.Public reward incentive banner: PASS - Banner with discount code mention visible on /reviews
features_tested.Order completion email review link: PASS (code verified) - Links to /reviews not Trustpilot
